stock_evidence.title: Apple App Store scrutiny intensifies in Europe
stock_evidence.body_excerpt: Regulators in Europe opened a new investigation into App Store payment rules, adding regulation risk for Apple services revenue.

stock_evidence.title: Apple supplier concerns grow amid China lockdowns
stock_evidence.body_excerpt: Apple suppliers face renewed production delays as China lockdowns disrupt iPhone assembly and raise supply chain risk before the US market open.

stock_evidence.title: Apple iPhone demand in China shows early signs of softness
stock_evidence.body_excerpt: Analysts pointed to softening China demand for iPhone models, increasing uncertainty for Apple revenue estimates.

stock_evidence.title: Microsoft cloud contract boosts enterprise outlook
stock_evidence.body_excerpt: Microsoft announced a large Azure cloud contract with an enterprise customer, supporting revenue expectations for the coming quarter.

stock_evidence.title: Azure margins remain a focus into Microsoft earnings
stock_evidence.body_excerpt: Investors focused on Azure margins, cloud growth, and enterprise software renewals ahead of Microsoft earnings.

stock_evidence.title: iPad production normalizes after component shortage
stock_evidence.body_excerpt: Apple suppliers reported that iPad production normalized after a component shortage, reducing near-term supply chain pressure.

stock_evidence.title: Cloud software spending survey highlights Microsoft Azure strength
stock_evidence.body_excerpt: A CIO survey showed durable cloud spending and Microsoft Azure share gains in enterprise software budgets.

stock_evidence.title: JPMorgan analysts warn deposit costs may rise with Fed hikes
stock_evidence.body_excerpt: JPMorgan Chase could face higher deposit costs as interest rates and Fed tightening reshape bank funding margins.

stock_evidence.title: Bank regulators discuss capital requirements
stock_evidence.body_excerpt: Regulators discussed capital requirements and credit risk supervision for large US banks including JPMorgan Chase.

sector_evidence.title: US futures mixed as Fed rate risk remains in focus
sector_evidence.body_excerpt: Investors weighed inflation, Fed rate uncertainty, recession risk, and equity volatility before the open.
